news.title: U.S. crude trims losses after White House denies Iran state media report about Hormuz opening
news.summary: Traders assess whether U.S. is nearing a deal with Iran that would restore traffic in the Strait of Hormuz. Oil prices trim losses as traders assess whether deal is near.

news.title: Republicans stare down inflation abyss with midterms fast approaching
news.summary: Republicans are struggling to find a clear message to battle high prices. President Trump is pushing for funding for a White House ballroom. The White House is seeking $200 million for the project.

news.title: Jamie Dimon says JPMorgan Chase could spend $20 billion on acquisition: 'We are on the lookout'
news.summary: JPMorgan is the largest U.S. bank by assets. A $20 billion deal would be among the largest in JPMorgan's history.

news.title: Alabama asks Supreme Court to allow congressional map that dilutes Black vote
news.summary: A three-judge panel in Birmingham, Alabama, found that the state's proposed map of House districts was 'intentionally discriminatory" The panel found the map was ' intentionally discriminatory' and 'discriminatory'

news.title: Boeing CEO says company met requirements to increase 737 Max production to 47 jets per month
news.summary: Boeing CEO Kelly Ortberg said the company has met FAA requirements to ramp up its production of 737 Max aircraft to 47 per month.

news.title: Momentus’s stock nearly triples in 2 days as the space company raises more cash from investors
news.summary: Momentus investors continue to cheer as the space firm secures more cash through a private placement of stock. Momentus is currently valued at around £1.5bn.

news.title: Cancer treatment already costs hundreds of thousands of dollars — and it’s about to get even worse
news.summary: Someone who survived brain cancer in the 1990s explains how the Affordable Care Act could have helped. "I think it would have helped a lot of people," he says.

news.title: This bear market signal Wall Street ignores is putting your money at risk right now
news.summary: Veteran trader Steve Burns prepares for a 50% decline. Burns exposes the 3 “deadly stock-market sins’ destroying portfolios.

news.title: Micron investors are partying like it’s 1987. Analysts say the stock still looks pretty cheap.
news.summary: Shares of Micron were headed for their best monthly performance since 1987. Analysts still see them as a value play. Micron shares were down 0.7% to $16.50 on Monday.

news.title: Why America is losing the AI productivity war to 3.5 million Chinese STEM graduates
news.summary: Big Tech’s structural mistakes are costing stock investors and fueling a massive talent crisis. The tech industry is facing a talent crisis and needs to fix it, experts say.
